specs.key_requirements: R2: Module caching via sys.modules, R4: import/from-import syntax. Import resolution pipeline that needs to integrate with MAMBA_MODULES
Internal RuntimeSymbol struct (name, addr, params, return_type). JIT symbol registration — where FFI function pointers get wired
JIT codegen for function calls. Needs to emit correct call instructions for FFI function pointers resolved from MAMBA_MODULES
